preset.budget_guardrail: Standard-style comparison cloned across expanded v1.8 operator variants with isolated v1.8 outputs.
preset.description: v1.8 standard-style raw-vs-centered operator-family comparison campaign.
preset.name: family-standard

reproducibility.command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m eml_symbolic_regression.cli campaign family-standard --output-root artifacts/campaigns --label v1.8-family-standard-scoped --overwrite --formula exp --formula log --formula beer_lambert --seed 0

suite.description: v1.8 standard-style raw-vs-centered operator-family comparison matrix.
